posts.author: rivkam (Rivka)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board that represents as meeting board
each meeting has an attendees column that represents the attendees in the meeting
when i choose from the user in the account people to the meeting
i don’t want them to get a notification that they have been assigned to the item
how can i prevent it?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! Shannon here with the monday team. Thanks for walking us through your use case.

There are two different notification settings you can enable on your board!

  1. Mute all notifications for board owners AND board members (mentions, assignments, replies, automations).
  2. Mute all notifications for board members.

Click on the three-dot icon in the upper right-hand corner of your board > “Notifications” to find both settings:

image645×617 40.1 KB

Please note that both settings turn off all notifications, not just notifications for assignments. Alternatively, each user can edit their personal notification settings (avatar icon > “My profile” > “Notifications” > “Collaboration” > “Assigned to me”). However, turning off their personal notifications for assignments will apply across the entire account and not one specific board.

Let me know if you have any additional questions!
